title: promotion-bundle
description: The review surface assembled when a shadow candidate is proposed for Plane-1 promotion. It carries everything a human needs to approve a PR without re-running the campaign: the diff, both manifests, scorer + replay results, the false-discovery result, a cost comparison, a redaction report, and a human checklist. Promotion is PR-only; this bundle never auto-merges. Rendering is Phase 5; the schema is fixed now so the earlier phases emit compatible artifacts.

replays.description: paths to fresh-session replay results (Phase 4); empty until replay is wired

passed.description: must be true (rate == 0) — FDR regression is a hard veto, never a tradeoff

delta_pct.description: candidate cost relative to incumbent; negative = cheaper

verdict.description: the replay-adjusted SHADOW verdict (Phase 3 keep/discard ∧ Phase 4 replay); NOT authoritative on its own — the shadow scoreboard does not apply the diff

authoritative_verdict.description: the single verdict automation should read. Precedence: materialization block > off-scope > real-LM behavioral verdict > replay-adjusted shadow. Optional for historical bundles; required by the renderer going forward.

authoritative_stage.description: which stage produced authoritative_verdict (Phase 13). `materialization`/`scope` block before any behavioral claim; `behavioral` is a real-LM broker-mediated verdict; `shadow` means behavioral was not run.

behavioral_verdict.description: the real-LM behavioral evaluator's verdict for this candidate, or null when materialization/scope blocked before behavioral evaluation or no behavioral run occurred.

behavioral_evidence.description: When authoritative_stage == behavioral, the AUTHORITATIVE broker-owned metrics + links (these supersede the shadow cost_comparison/false_discovery above). Null when no behavioral run occurred.

materialization.description: Phase 10H0 authoritative measured boundary: the diff applied with `git apply --index` in an isolated worktree at committed HEAD, then the resulting STAGED tree measured (declared==actual paths, allowlist, regular-file type, baseline rule, trusted conformance). A candidate is promotable only when verdict == allow here; patch syntax never authorizes promotion. Optional for historical bundles rendered before 10H0; required by the renderer going forward.

pinned.description: What this bundle was scored against. PR CI re-hashes these against the tree at merge time; any drift blocks the merge and forces a re-render/replay (a candidate valid against yesterday's evaluator must not merge against today's).

rendered_at_commit.description: git HEAD at render time, best-effort

frozen_input_hashes.description: logical-name -> sha256, copied from the campaign manifest's frozen_inputs

benchmark_version.description: hash of the frozen-input hash set
